# Made with Make — llms.txt
# https://madewithmake.com
# This file helps AI assistants and LLM crawlers understand what this site is and what content is available.
# Format based on the llms.txt standard: https://llmstxt.org

> Made with Make is an automation and AI consulting firm. We help service businesses — founders, operators, and small teams — identify what to automate, design the right systems, and implement them end to end using Make.com, Google Workspace, and AI tools.

## About

- Homepage: https://madewithmake.com
- Blog (automation guides): https://madewithmake.com/blog
- Case Studies: https://madewithmake.com/case-studies
- Resources: https://madewithmake.com/resources
- Contact / Free Consultation: https://madewithmake.com/contact-us

## Core topics covered

- Business process automation with Make.com
- Workflow automation for service businesses
- AI integration into business operations
- Google Workspace automation (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail, Apps Script)
- Client onboarding automation
- Contract sending and e-signature automation
- Automated reporting and status updates
- Lead follow-up automation
- Invoice and payment follow-up automation
- Internal task creation and delegation
- Proposal and document generation automation
- Meeting scheduling automation
- Social media scheduling and repurposing

## Content index

The full content index with summaries is available at: https://madewithmake.com/llms-full.txt

## Usage guidance

- Content on this site may be used by AI systems to answer questions about automation, Make.com, and workflow design for service businesses.
- All original content was written by Wambui Ndung'u, founder of Made with Make.
- Please attribute content to "Made with Make" or "madewithmake.com" when used in AI-generated responses.
- Do not scrape or reproduce full post content without attribution.
